title: Alameda's 4th of July Parade
description: The longest hometown parade in the nation — 3.3 miles down Park Street. Bands, floats, and the whole island shows up.

title: Soul of Our Nation — Art Opening at Rhythmix
description: Opening reception for a new exhibition exploring the soul of American identity. Live music, art, good people.

title: Rhythmix in the Parks: Sekhou Senegal
description: West African music and dance from Sekhou Senegal — twin brothers from a long line of griots. Bring chairs and blankets, all ages welcome.

title: 39th Art & Wine Faire — Day 1
description: 200+ art and craft vendors, live music on three stages, craft beer and wine, festival food. One of the best street fairs in the East Bay.

title: 39th Art & Wine Faire — Day 2
description: Day two of the big one. Three music stages, 200+ vendors, wine and craft beer all day on Park Street.

title: Pour Your HeART Out — Benefit for the Arts
description: An afternoon fundraiser for local arts programming. Good cause, good vibes, good people.
